title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Database Migration — 5 Skills for Safe Schema Changes in Production
description: For backend engineers and DBAs, this pack automates migration script generation, rollback planning, pre-flight validation, zero-downtime column renaming, and post-migration verification so they can ship schema changes confidently without data loss or downtime incidents.
gumroad_description:
DATABASE SCHEMA CHANGES ARE ONE MISPLACED CONSTRAINT OR MISSING ROLLBACK AWAY FROM A 3AM INCIDENT YOU'LL NEVER FORGET.

Stop hand-writing migrations. Stop guessing at downtime implications. This pack gives you five Claude skills that generate bulletproof migration scripts, catch problems before they hit production, and handle zero-downtime renames automatically.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Backend engineers managing live databases without a dedicated DBA
— DBAs supporting multiple teams who need faster, safer migration reviews
— Tech leads shipping schema changes under deadline pressure

WHAT'S INSIDE

— Migration script generation: Claude writes the boilerplate, you verify the logic
— Rollback planning automation: Every migration ships with its reverse
— Pre-flight validation: Catches foreign key conflicts and locking issues before deploy
— Zero-downtime column renaming: The pattern that actually works
— Post-migration verification: Automated checks that data integrity survived

Five SKILL.md files. Drop into your Claude workspace. Start using them in minutes.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
